case_title: KENNETH WILLIAMS VS. ROGER D. MILES

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, KENNETH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MILES, ROGER D. THE STOVE AND CARPET REPLACEMENT EXPENSES ARE NOT PROPER DEDUCTIONS FROM THE DEPOSIT AFTER A 9-YEAR TENANCY, BUT LANDLORD WAS ENTITLED TO OFFSET LOST RENT WITH THE DEPOSIT AFTER TENANT BREACHED THE LEASE BY MOVING OUT BEFORE ITS EXPIRATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, KENNETH
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF MAY-01-2019
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,338.60 FILED BY WILLIAMS, KENNETH AS TO DEFENDANT MILES, ROGER D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-15-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF KENNETH WILLIAMS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROGERS D. MILES IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2018 - JUDGMENT.
